## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would change existing behavior)
- [ ] UI/UX improvement
- [ ] Refactor / chore / docs

## Testing
<!-- How did you verify this works? Steps, screenshots, recordings. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch name follows the convention in [CONTRIBUTING.md](.github/CONTRIBUTING.md#branch-naming) (e.g. `feature/...`, `fix/...`, `chore/...`)
- [ ] Commits are authored by a human — **no `Co-Authored-By: Claude` / `Cursor` / `Codex` or other AI co-author trailers** ([why](.github/CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-authorship))
- [ ] `bun run build` passes locally
- [ ] `cargo check` passes in `src-tauri/`
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have signed the CLA (first-time contributors will be prompted by the bot)
